title: Crafting Mats
description: Turn every* block into a crafting table
body:
Crafting Mats adds the Crafting Mat. This item can be placed on top most blocks to turn that block into a crafting table. This makes it extremely useful for building or decoration, especially when a normal crafting table clashes with your build.

![A before and after of a build, showing a crafting table being jammed in a space for convenience versus a crafting mat filling that same space with more style points](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jygl7wra/images/e51a92b4a0551382cd98a73f60a24f08b4afade1.png)
